title: 10 best herbal teas for stomach growling
description: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, teas helps with stomach growling because of its soothing properties that calm digestive issues. The tea's anti-inflammatory compounds and flavonoids promote relaxation and reduce muscle spasms in the stomach, alleviating discomfort and hunger pangs.
